name: dam_intro_swirl_bond_anim
description: Dam intro Bond-animation comparison aligned by authored intro timer. D43 restored phase 3; animation identity, metadata, and phase-3 coverage are strict. The mirrored idle hand is a natural-seed randomGetNext choice and is narrowly owned by FID-0063 because stock/native boot histories need not share a PRNG phase. Exact timer zero is excluded because it straddles the asynchronous stock DMA presence boundary already guarded by the actor audit. The separate dam_intro_camera_path route owns camera selection/path and D31/D32/D35; this route compares camera mode/setup/Bond so retail's randomized intro-camera pick cannot invalidate the animation oracle. D41's original menu/direct timing claim is refuted. For stock/native comparison, the ACT_BONDINTRO-to-ACT_STAND identity boundary is event-aligned within one retail three-tick batch; its numeric idle-frame field stays narrowly waived because fresh retail captures sample the same first 0.75 frame on different timer lattices (100 or 102), so a fixed native phase offset cannot satisfy both. Phase-3 onset is bounded to 30 timer units because retail fires from an RNG-jittered AI sleep-wake boundary, then phase 3 is compared at equal animation age with coverage and metadata gates.
